narrativeProgression.summary: Administrative records reveal prior attempts to bury this case.
narrativeProgression.beatNarrative: A timestamped dispatch from a dead line arrives through SMS, email, and Telegram at once.

threadUpdates.update: Signal One: A timestamped dispatch from a dead line arrives through SMS, email, and Telegram at once.
Peripheral signal tied to Spectrogram of confession burst remains unresolved.
Minor anomaly logged but not yet actionable.
No new movement on false lead this cycle.
Subtle repetition appears in unrelated communications.

evidenceDrops.title: Static Between Stations - Day 05 call log
evidenceDrops.summary: Artifact appears authoritative but contains one intentional inconsistency tied to Spectrogram of confession burst.

imagePrompt.style: hyper-realistic forensic horror, analog imperfection, grounded true-crime framing
imagePrompt.prompt: Static Between Stations ARG artifact Day 05. Type: call_log. Clue focus: Spectrogram of confession burst. Location: Abandoned commuter rail control annex. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Camera: Canon EOS R6, 35mm prime, ISO 3200, f/1.8, 1/40 shutter. Visual defects: sensor noise, halation bloom, slight motion blur, fingerprint smudge, timestamp burn-in. Lighting: practical sodium-vapor spill with deep shadow falloff, imperfect white balance. Composition: evidence-forward framing, handwritten marks, believable wear, no cinematic polish. Subtle misleading cue included.
imagePrompt.negativePrompt: clean CGI, fantasy look, glossy studio lighting, over-sharpened edges, watermark, logo, gore fetish, cartoon style

audioPrompt.style: psychological dread, industrial ambience, noisy field recording authenticity
audioPrompt.prompt: Static Between Stations call_log audio cue for day 5. Clue anchor: Spectrogram of confession burst. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Texture: low drone bed, distant metallic resonance, intermittent room-tone dropouts. Include one decipherable spoken fragment and one environmental clue (HVAC hum, rail click, siren bleed, pager chirp). Add mild tape flutter, codec smear, clipped transients, and uneven dynamic floor to keep it grounded.

interactions.messageTemplate: {{player_alias}}, before you move: chain-of-custody on today's drop is unstable. Confirm Spectrogram of confession burst and tell me if your last call still stands (decision.day_04.primary).
I heard my own words on a line I never called. If you still trust {{trusted_contact}}, do not forward this to the wrong desk.
Off-record: I can publish tonight, but your previous choice is already circulating. I need one verification point tied to Spectrogram of confession burst.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if decision.log contains any entry for previous day
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: You repeated yesterday's pattern ({{last_major_choice}}). People who survive this case learn faster.

adaptiveLines: Reference previous choice without breaking realism.
Acknowledge response latency as if monitored by live actors.
Escalate or soften tone based on trust flags and solved puzzles.
